final_recommendation.title_ru: Модуль 4 групп детекторов / 2 выхода BUS-2/BUS-1 (накладной монтаж)
final_recommendation.description_ru: Модуль 010130.10 предназначен для расширения охранных панелей MB-Secure или MB12/24/48/100/256 plus посредством подключения по шине BUS. Обеспечивает 4 входа групп детекторов с функцией сброса и 2 транзисторных выхода (макс. 30 В пост. тока / 50 мА на выход), совместим с любой панелью стандарта BUS-2 или BUS-1.
final_recommendation.category_suggestion: Охранная сигнализация — шинные модули расширения (интрузионные системы безопасности)

specs.input_feature: Reset function; supports hardwired/conventional detectors (contacts, passive glass breakage sensors)
specs.compatible_panels: MB-Secure, MB12, MB24, MB48, MB100, MB256 plus
specs.5_input_mode: Supports 5-Input module mode; can replace 013130.xx modules
specs.power_supply: From module bus or external power supply depending on application
specs.approval: G109010 (IDT), Class C EN 50131-3, Grade 3, Class II
specs.status: Current (listed on active Honeywell Commercial Security website)

key_findings: Identity fully confirmed: Honeywell PN 010130.10 is the '4DG/2OP Module BUS-2/BUS-1 s.m.' (4 Detector Groups / 2 Outputs Module, surface mount), listed on the official Honeywell Commercial Security Germany website.
Product family: Intrusion Alarm Technology → Connection Modules → BUS Modules → BUS-2/BUS-1 series.
Part number status: CURRENT — actively listed on the Honeywell manufacturer product portal (security.honeywell.de) as of the search date.
The module is certified to EN 50131-3 Grade 3, Class II (IDT approval G109010), indicating a high-grade commercial intrusion security standard.
Compatible with Honeywell MB-Secure and MB12/24/48/100/256 plus intrusion control panels.
Supports 5-Input module operating mode as a drop-in replacement for 013130.xx series modules.
Also confirmed by authorized German distributor ROTEIV (honeywell.roteiv-shop.de) and ADI Global Czech Republic (adiglobal.cz) under the same part number and description.
No public pricing found on any indexed source; this is a B2B/trade-channel product.
ambiguities: No direct image URL could be extracted from the manufacturer or distributor pages via search results.
No public price (EUR or otherwise) was found on any distributor or manufacturer page — pricing appears to be trade/quotation-only.

The suffix '.10' in the part number likely denotes a packaging or revision variant (surface-mount version); other suffixes such as '.17' exist for flush-mount variants (see 010120.17), but no explicit documentation of versioning differences was found in search results.
final_recommendation.confidence_notes: Product identity is confirmed directly on the official Honeywell Commercial Security manufacturer website (security.honeywell.de) with the exact part number 010130.10, full product name, description, and certifications. This is corroborated by two independent authorized distributors (ROTEIV and ADI Global). No ambiguity exists regarding product identity. Confidence is high. The only gaps are the absence of a public price and a direct image URL, neither of which affects identity confidence.
